description: Create a UML Use Case Diagram for a 'Patient Portal System'. The diagram must feature a system boundary labeled 'Patient Portal System' containing six use cases: 'Login', 'View Medical Records', 'Schedule Appointment', 'Send Message', 'Manage Users', and 'Generate Report'. Position three actors outside the boundary: 'Patient', 'Doctor', and 'Admin'. Connect the actors to their respective use cases: 'Patient' to 'Login', 'View Medical Records', 'Schedule Appointment', and 'Send Message'; 'Doctor' to 'Login', 'View Medical Records', 'Send Message', and 'Generate Report'; and 'Admin' to 'Login', 'Manage Users', and 'Generate Report'. Save the completed diagram to /home/ga/Documents/PatientPortal_UseCaseDiagram.eddx.
